compiled_state.title: As an agent, the review gate and supporting scripts exclude incoming-only files during rebase
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Add REBASE_HEAD incoming-only file filtering to pre-commit-review-gate.sh, record-test-status.sh, capture-review-diff.sh, and review-complexity-classifier.sh — all scripts with existing MERGE_HEAD filtering that must be symmetric.
**Why**: Without this, the test gate and hash computation correctly handle rebase but these scripts produce false positives and hash mismatches, preventing SC5 (squash-rebase recovery completes without interruption).
**Scope**:
- IN: REBASE_HEAD filtering in pre-commit-review-gate.sh, record-test-status.sh, capture-review-diff.sh, review-complexity-classifier.sh; bash tests for each
- OUT: pre-commit-test-gate.sh and compute-diff-hash.sh (covered by sibling stories)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, pre-commit-review-gate.sh excludes incoming-only files from review enforcement when REBASE_HEAD is present
  <- Satisfies: "The squash-rebase recovery path in merge-to-main.sh completes without test gate false-positives on incoming-only files"
- When this story is complete, record-test-status.sh filters staged files identically to pre-commit-test-gate.sh during rebase (same file set, same hash)
  <- Satisfies: "compute-diff-hash.sh produces a stable hash during rebase by excluding incoming-only files from the diff"
- When this story is complete, capture-review-diff.sh scopes its diff to worktree-branch files during rebase
  <- Satisfies: "compute-diff-hash.sh produces a stable hash during rebase"
- When this story is complete, review-complexity-classifier.sh correctly detects rebase commits
- When this story is complete, bash tests verify REBASE_HEAD filtering for each modified script
  <- Satisfies: "Test suite includes bash tests that simulate REBASE_HEAD state"
- Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Reliability] Must fail open on missing onto file or unresolvable ref (same fail-open pattern as test gate)
- [Reliability] Must use git rev-parse --git-dir for per-worktree state resolution
- [Testing] Must mirror existing MERGE_HEAD test patterns for each script
- [Maintainability] Follow same REBASE_HEAD pattern as Story 1 for consistency

comments.body: Story complete: REBASE_HEAD filtering added to all 4 scripts (pre-commit-review-gate.sh, record-test-status.sh, capture-review-diff.sh, review-complexity-classifier.sh). All RED tests GREEN. Committed as 73a0630b + 12e32566.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
